::: {.callout-tip}
## Commit your changes
Remember to save your progress regularly by committing your changes with Git.

1. Save your changes in RStudio with the `Save` button.
2. Render your Rmarkdown document into html with the `Render` button.
3. Open the `Git` tab in RStudio.
4. Tick the files you have changed - usually the quarto (qmd) and html files for the practical.
5. Click `Commit` and write a short message describing your changes.

:::
